fields.label: Allow Substitution
fields.description: Only honored when the combo itself is Customizable. The cashier may swap this component for any sellable item in the Substitution Item Group.

fields.label: Substitution Item Group
fields.description: Pool of allowed alternatives (e.g. Cold Beverages: Pepsi → Coca-Cola, 7Up…).

fields.label: Charge Price Difference
fields.description: Off = free swap within the group. On = if the substitute's list price exceeds the default's, the difference is added to the combo price.
